revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月十一]][[zh:七月十一]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 11|qq=July 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[景行天皇]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|71|en|71|qid=Q4643093|lt=71|1=71}} {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}}) – The 12th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|qid=Q329723|lt=Keikō Tennō|1=Emperor Keikō}}, ascended the throne. * {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen|1=Hōgen (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156|1=1156}} {{ill|July 29|en|July 29|qid=Q2717|lt=July 29|1=July 29}}) – The conflict known as the {{ill|Hōgen rebellion|en|Hōgen rebellion|qid=Q842357|lt=Hōgen no Ran|1=Hōgen rebellion}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 13rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1585|en|1585|qid=Q6736|lt=1585|1=1585}} {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}}) – The Minister of Right, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q187550}}, assumed the position of {{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}}. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}}) – The signing of the {{ill|Nichiro Shūkō Tsūshō Jōyaku|ja|日露修好通商条約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nichiro Shūkō Tsūshō Jōyaku|1=Treaty of Amity and Commerce between Russia and Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11510728}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munetaka|en|Tokugawa Munetaka|qid=Q6998366|lt=Tokugawa Sōyō|1=Tokugawa Munetaka}}, the 4th lord of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1730|en|1730|qid=Q6957|lt=1730|1=1730}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|qid=Q7616|lt=1839|1=1839}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}}) – {{ill|Kume Kunitake|en|Kume Kunitake|qid=Q707533|lt=Kumē Kunitake|1=Kume Kunitake}}, a historian (died {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}}) – {{ill|Hozumi Nobushige|en|Hozumi Nobushige|qid=Q799787|lt=Hotsumi Chinshige|1=Hozumi Nobushige}}, a legal scholar (died {{ill|1926|en|1926|qid=Q5259|lt=1926|1=1926}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iesato|en|Tokugawa Iesato|qid=Q672741|lt=Tokugawa Ietada|1=Tokugawa Iesato}}, the 16th head of the Tokugawa family (died {{ill|1940|en|1940|qid=Q18633|lt=1940|1=1940}}).
== Deaths == * [[:en:嘉禄|嘉禄]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1225|en|1225|qid=Q5403|lt=1225|1=1225}} {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Masako|en|Hōjō Masako|qid=Q463961|lt=Hojo Masako|1=Hōjō Masako}}, wife of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} (born {{ill|1157|en|1157|qid=Q19654|lt=1157|1=1157}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}} {{ill|August 10|en|August 10|qid=Q2779|lt=August 10|1=August 10}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Ujimasa|en|Hōjō Ujimasa|qid=Q736948|lt=Hojo Ujimasa|1=Hōjō Ujimasa}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1538|en|1538|qid=Q6470|lt=1538|1=1538}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1662|en|1662|qid=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}} {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}}) – {{ill|Ii Naokatsu|en|Ii Naokatsu|qid=Q5994900|lt=Ii Naokatsu|1=Ii Naokatsu}}, lord of Hikone and Anchu (born {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}}) – {{ill|Iwase Tadashin|ja|岩瀬忠震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwase Tadashin|1=Iwase Tadanari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6526437}}, a Bakushin official of the late Edo period (born {{ill|1818|en|1818|qid=Q6964|lt=1818|1=1818}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|August 12|en|August 12|qid=Q2777|lt=August 12|1=August 12}}) – {{ill|Sakuma Shōzan|en|Sakuma Shōzan|qid=Q739298|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Sakuma Shōzan}}, a thinker (born {{ill|1811|en|1811|qid=Q6928|lt=1811|1=1811}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|10|7|12|6|11|8|7|0711|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
